name: vmhq-mcp
description: Personal VMHQ MCP connector for Home Assistant, Miniflux, Karakeep, SearXNG, Proxmox, Memos, and NextDNS.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex to your personal VMHQ MCP tools
interface.longDescription: Use the VMHQ MCP plugin to connect Codex to your remote personal MCP endpoint for Home Assistant, Miniflux, Karakeep, SearXNG, Proxmox, Memos, and NextDNS. The plugin stores no secrets; Codex reads the bearer token from VMHQ_MCP_API_KEY.
defaultPrompt: List my available VMHQ MCP tools
Search the web with my SearXNG MCP
